system.description: You can chain together short-distance teleports, about as far as you could jump with a run up.

upgrades.name: Optic Triangulation
upgrades.description: You can teleport anywhere you can see.

upgrades.name: Duo Port
upgrades.description: You can teleport one other person with you.

upgrades.name: Telefrag
upgrades.description: You can use your teleportation offensively by teleporting something inside your target. Your melee attacks gain: Special: Target suffers one Wound.

upgrades.name: Retrieve Protocol
upgrades.description: Once a day, you can attune to any object you can lift. It can then be teleported to you, from any distance.
